_comment: Manual news overrides. Add a company name as key; value object must have 'key_dev' (the news string, under 200 chars) and optionally 'expires' (YYYY-MM-DD; auto-removes after this date).

Company Name.key_dev: Brief description of material event under 200 characters.

Flex Ltd.key_dev: Announced spin-off of data center EMS business (~$6.6Bn revenue) and acquisition of Electrical Power Products. S&P affirmed BBB-/Stable May 6 2026; pro forma leverage expected to remain below 3x.
